mapper.sql: note_id, author_id, title_snapshot, cover_url_snapshot, visibility, note_status, eligible_status, published_at, last_event_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_rank.rank_note_index ( note_id, author_id, title_snapshot, cover_url_snapshot, visibility, note_status, eligible_status, published_at, last_event_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{authorId}, #{titleSnapshot}, #{coverUrlSnapshot}, #{visibility}, #{noteStatus}, #{eligibleStatus}, #{publishedAt}, #{lastEventId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE author_id = VALUES(author_id), title_snapshot = VALUES(title_snapshot), cover_url_snapshot = VALUES(cover_url_snapshot), visibility = VALUES(visibility), note_status = VALUES(note_status), eligible_status = VALUES(eligible_status), published_at = VALUES(published_at), last_event_id = VALUES(last_event_id), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_rank.rank_note_index SET visibility = #{visibility}, note_status = #{noteStatus}, eligible_status = #{eligibleStatus}, last_event_id = #{lastEventId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
